notes: Independent FTLP burn. No Pool NFT output. vout[0] ends with 02436f6465 and targets EaterAddress.
Pool NFT + NTape + FTAbyC + FTLP structure. Should not be classified as OrderBook.
NFT changes owner while large TBC pays seller. Must distinguish payment from change.
Canonical atomic settlement example using UTXO all-or-nothing semantics.
No FT input. Outputs FT Code(500sat) + FT Tape(0sat). Contract ID = this txid.
FT Code input -> new Code+Tape to receiver with FT change.
FT Code+Tape sent to EaterAddress. FT permanently exits circulation.
OP_RETURN metadata + 7 slot UTXOs (100sat each). Not an NFT mint.
Consumes collection slot. Outputs Code(200sat) + Hold(100sat) + Tape(0sat).
Code+Hold consumed and re-created with new Hold address.
Creates empty pool. poolNFT.Code(1000sat) + NTape(all zeros). No FT/FTLP outputs.
NTape amounts go from zero to nonzero. Creates full 6-UTXO pool structure.
Pool sat increases, user receives FTAbyAddress. ft_lp unchanged. No FTLP output.
Pool sat decreases, user receives P2PKH TBC. ft_lp unchanged.
FTLP burned to EaterAddress. User receives FTAbyAddress + P2PKH TBC.
Multiple FTAbyPool inputs merged. NTape amounts unchanged.
Independent FTLP merge. No Pool NFT involved. vout[0] ends with 02436f6465.
Independent FTLP burn. Pool NFT not involved, NTape unchanged.
P2PKH input. vout[0] = 946B sell script with TBC locked as saleVolume.
FT input. vout[0] = 1010B buy script (300sat dust) + FT Code+Tape locked.
Buy+Sell+FT consumed. FT to seller, TBC to buyer, fees deducted.
TBC locked to HTLC script with OP_IF OP_SHA256. hashlock + timelock 79017.
Preimage revealed in scriptSig. OP_TRUE path. TBC to receiver.
OP_FALSE path. nSequence=0xFFFFFFFE, locktime >= timelock. TBC back to sender.
Creates 2/3 multisig. nonstandard output with OP_CHECKMULTISIG + MTape.
TBC locked to PiggyBank script. ad56ba signature. lockTime=29066.
PiggyBank UTXO spent with nSequence<0xFFFFFFFF, locktime>=lockTime.
